firecrawl.markdown:
Marco Carola – – Icónica Santalucía Sevilla Fest
================================================

[Ver todos los eventos](https://visitasevilla.es/ahora-en-sevilla/)

06.06.26 ![](http://tic.visitasevilla.es/vsev/web_php/imatges/esdeveniments/74698deb9748de4139353826.jpg)

Marco Carola, uno de los nombres más influyentes de la electrónica mundial, llega a la Plaza de España, en colaboración con Rebels. El maestro del tech house ofrecerá una sesión cargada de energía y su inconfundible sello musical. Una noche muy esperada por los amantes de la electrónica, que transformará la Plaza en una auténtica pista de baile.

[Tickets](https://iconicafest.com/marco-carola/)

Lo que necesitas saber está en tu correo

hasDescription.longDescription: Marco Carola, one of the most influential names in global electronic music, arrives at Plaza de España, in collaboration with Rebels. The tech house master will offer an energetic session with his unmistakable musical signature. A highly anticipated night for electronic music lovers, which will transform the Plaza into a true dance floor.
hasDescription.shortDescription: Marco Carola at Plaza de España.

hasAdditionalInformation.accessTip: Arrive early to find a good spot.
hasAdditionalInformation.conditions: Free entry, reservation in advance is recommended.
hasAdditionalInformation.curiosities: Marco Carola is known for his energetic sets.

frequentlyAskedQuestion.question: Is entry free?
frequentlyAskedQuestion.answer: Yes, entry is free but reservation is recommended.

hasAdditionalInformation.remarks: Entry with drinks is not allowed.
